title: Fermented Juicy Adventurous Dutch Ackee Stir-fry
description: This dish features fermented and juicy ackee cooked with a blend of aromatic spices to create an adventurous twist on a traditional Dutch dish.

ingredients.name: Thai bird chilies or serrano peppers, finely chopped

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add the finely chopped red onions.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, stir-frying until fragrant and slightly translucent.
Toss in the fermented ackee, Thai bird chilies or serrano peppers, coriander seeds crushed, and a pinch of tumeric. Stir well to combine.
Stir gently for 1-2 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
Season with salt as needed. Garnish with a sprinkle of cayenne pepper if desired.
Serve hot as a side dish or main meal.
